sentences.sentence: To understand more about the earth's history, humans have often looked to the natural environment for insight into the past.
sentences.translation: 为了更多地了解地球的历史，人类常常向自然环境寻求对过去的洞见。

structure.text: To understand more about the earth's history
humans
have often looked to the natural environment for insight into the past

difficult_points: To understand more about... 是不定式作目的状语，说明人类观察自然环境的目的。
look to...for... 表示“向……寻求……”，是固定搭配。

sentences.sentence: The bristlecone pine (Pinus longaeva), of the White Mountains in California, has served this purpose greater than any other species of tree on the planet.
sentences.translation: 生长在加州白山的狐尾松（学名 Pinus longaeva），在这方面的作用胜过地球上任何其他树种。

structure.text: The bristlecone pine (Pinus longaeva)
of the White Mountains in California
has served this purpose greater than any other species of tree on the planet

difficult_points: (Pinus longaeva) 是狐尾松的拉丁学名，作为插入的同位语说明。
greater than any other species 是比较级结构，强调狐尾松在这一用途上独一无二的地位。
this purpose 指代前一句提到的“为了解地球历史提供洞见”这一用途。

expressions.meaning_zh: 发挥作用；起到某种效用

sentences.sentence: Conditions here are brutal: scant precipitation and low average temperatures mean a short growing season, only intensified by ferocious wind and mal-nutritious rocky.
sentences.translation: 这里的环境条件十分恶劣：降水稀少、平均气温低，导致生长季节短暂，再加上狂风和贫瘠多石的土壤，情况更加严峻。

structure.text: Conditions here
are brutal
scant precipitation and low average temperatures mean a short growing season
only intensified by ferocious wind and mal-nutritious rocky

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容具体说明 Conditions...are brutal 中“恶劣”体现在哪些方面。
only intensified by... 是过去分词短语，修饰前面整个状况，说明狂风和贫瘠土壤使情况雪上加霜。
mal-nutritious rocky 之后疑似省略了 soil 一词，是原文排版/用词不完整之处，此处按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, bristlecone pines have claimed these barren slopes as their permanent home.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，狐尾松还是把这些贫瘠的山坡当作了永久的家园。

structure.text: bristlecone pines
have claimed these barren slopes as their permanent home

difficult_points: Nevertheless 表示转折，与前一句描述的恶劣条件形成对比。
claim...as... 表示“将……认定/占据为……”。

sentences.sentence: Evolving here in this harsh environment, super-adapted and without much competition, bristlecones have earned their seat on the longevity throne by becoming the oldest living trees on the planet.
sentences.translation: 在这片严酷环境中演化、高度适应且几乎没有竞争压力，狐尾松凭借成为地球上现存最古老的树木，赢得了长寿之王的地位。

structure.text: Evolving here in this harsh environment, super-adapted and without much competition
bristlecones
have earned their seat on the longevity throne
by becoming the oldest living trees on the planet

difficult_points: Evolving...是现在分词短语作状语，说明狐尾松长寿地位形成的背景。
their seat on the longevity throne 是比喻说法，把狐尾松的长寿地位比作“长寿王座”。
by doing 表示方式，说明狐尾松是通过成为最古老的现存树木而赢得这一地位的。

sentences.sentence: Results of extensive studies on bristlecone pine stands have shown that in fact such, environmental limitations are positively associated with the attainment of great age.
sentences.translation: 对狐尾松林的大量研究结果表明，事实上，这类环境限制条件与树木获得高龄之间是正相关的。

structure.text: Results of extensive studies on bristlecone pine stands
have shown
that in fact such, environmental limitations are positively associated with the attainment of great age

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 have shown 的宾语。
such 后多出的逗号是原文排版问题，应连读为 such environmental limitations，即“这类环境限制条件”。
be positively associated with 表示“与……呈正相关”，是学术写作中的常见搭配。

sentences.sentence: This intriguing phenomenon will be discussed further on.
sentences.translation: 这一引人入胜的现象将在下文中进一步讨论。

structure.text: This intriguing phenomenon
will be discussed further on

difficult_points: This intriguing phenomenon 指代前一句提到的环境限制与高龄之间的正相关现象。
further on 表示“在后文中”，起承上启下的过渡作用。

sentences.sentence: But exactly how old is old?
sentences.translation: 但究竟“古老”意味着多老呢？

structure.text: how old is old

difficult_points: how old is old 是特殊疑问句，用第二个 old 反问“古老”这一概念的具体标准。
But 承接上文提出的话题，引出下文对狐尾松具体年龄的说明。

sentences.sentence: Sprouted before the invention of Egyptian hieroglyphs and long before the teachings of Jesus of Nazareth, Methuselah is the oldest bristlecone alive at roughly 4,700 years.
sentences.translation: 玛土撒拉早在埃及象形文字发明之前、也远早于拿撒勒人耶稣布道之前就已发芽，如今大约4700岁，是现存最古老的狐尾松。

structure.text: Sprouted before the invention of Egyptian hieroglyphs and long before the teachings of Jesus of Nazareth
Methuselah
is the oldest bristlecone alive at roughly 4,700 years

difficult_points: Sprouted... 是过去分词短语作状语，修饰 Methuselah，说明它发芽的时间之早。
Methuselah 是这棵狐尾松的名字，源自圣经中长寿人物玛土撒拉。
alive 是形容词作后置定语，修饰 the oldest bristlecone。

sentences.sentence: Although specimens of this age do not represent the species' average, there are 200 trees more than 3,000 years old, and two dozen more than 4,000.
sentences.translation: 尽管这种年龄的样本并不能代表该物种的平均水平，但仍有200棵树龄超过3000年，还有二十多棵超过4000年。

structure.text: Although specimens of this age do not represent the species' average
there are 200 trees more than 3,000 years old
and two dozen more than 4,000

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，说明高龄样本并非物种的普遍水平。
and two dozen more than 4,000 中省略了 there are...years old，与前一分句结构对称，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Considering that these high ages are obtained in the face of such remarkable environmental adversity, the bristlecone pines have become the focus of much scientific examination over the past half-century.
sentences.translation: 考虑到这些高龄是在如此严酷的环境逆境下取得的，狐尾松在过去半个世纪里已成为大量科学研究的焦点。

structure.text: Considering that these high ages are obtained in the face of such remarkable environmental adversity
the bristlecone pines
have become the focus of much scientific examination over the past half-century

difficult_points: Considering that 引导原因状语从句，considering 在此作连词使用，意为“考虑到”。
in the face of 表示“面对；在……的情况下”，强调环境逆境的严峻。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps most interested in the bristlecone pine are dendrochronologists or tree-ring daters.
sentences.translation: 对狐尾松最感兴趣的，或许要数树木年轮学家，也就是通过年轮测定年代的专家。

structure.text: Perhaps most interested in the bristlecone pine
are
dendrochronologists or tree-ring daters

difficult_points: 句子把表语 most interested in the bristlecone pine 提到句首，真正的主语是后面的 dendrochronologists or tree-ring daters。
tree-ring daters 是对 dendrochronologists 的通俗解释，二者所指相同。

sentences.sentence: With every strenuous year that passes in the While Mountains, each bristlecone grows and forms a new outer layer of cambium that reflects a season's particular ease or hardship.
sentences.translation: 在白山，每熬过艰难的一年，每棵狐尾松都会生长并形成一层新的外层形成层，忠实反映出那一季节的顺遂或艰辛。

structure.text: With every strenuous year that passes in the While Mountains
that passes in the While Mountains
each bristlecone
grows and forms a new outer layer of cambium
that reflects a season's particular ease or hardship

difficult_points: With every...year that passes 是介词短语作时间状语，相当于“每过一年”。
the While Mountains 中的 While 是原文排版错误，应为 White（白山），此处按原文保留。
that reflects... 是定语从句，修饰 a new outer layer of cambium，说明这层形成层记录当年气候状况的功能。

sentences.sentence: So while growing seasons may expand or shrink, the trees carry on, their growth rings faithfully recording the bad years alongside the goods.
sentences.translation: 因此，尽管生长季节可能延长或缩短，这些树依然顽强地生长，它们的年轮忠实地记录下了艰难的岁月和顺遂的岁月。

structure.text: while growing seasons may expand or shrink
the trees
carry on
their growth rings faithfully recording the bad years alongside the goods

difficult_points: while 在此表示“尽管；虽然”，引导让步状语从句。
their growth rings faithfully recording... 是独立主格结构，补充说明年轮记录气候变化这一伴随状态。
the goods 在此是名词化用法，与 the bad years 对应，指“顺遂的年份”。

sentences.sentence: Through examining the annual growth rings of both living and dead specimens, taking thousands of core samples, and by processes of cross-dating between trees and other qualitative records, scientists have compiled a continuous tree-ring record that dates back to the last Ice Age between eight and ten thousand years ago.
sentences.translation: 通过研究活体和死亡标本的年轮、采集数千份树芯样本，并结合树木之间及其他定性记录的交叉测年方法，科学家们编制出了一份连续的年轮记录，可以追溯到八千至一万年前的末次冰期。

structure.text: Through examining the annual growth rings of both living and dead specimens, taking thousands of core samples, and by processes of cross-dating between trees and other qualitative records
scientists
have compiled a continuous tree-ring record
that dates back to the last Ice Age between eight and ten thousand years ago

difficult_points: Through examining..., taking..., and by processes of... 三个并列的方式状语，共同说明科学家编制年轮记录所用的方法。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 a continuous tree-ring record，说明这份记录追溯的时间范围。

sentences.sentence: Among other linked accomplishments, this record has enhanced the dating process, helping to double-check and correct the radiocarbon-14 method to more accurately estimate the age of organic material.
sentences.translation: 除了其他相关成果之外，这份记录还改进了测年过程，有助于核对和校正碳14测年法，从而更准确地估算有机物质的年代。

structure.text: Among other linked accomplishments
this record
has enhanced the dating process
helping to double-check and correct the radiocarbon-14 method
to more accurately estimate the age of organic material

difficult_points: helping to... 是现在分词短语作状语，补充说明这份记录改进测年过程的具体方式。
to more accurately estimate... 是不定式作目的状语，说明校正碳14方法的最终目的。

sentences.sentence: Now more than ever the importance of monitoring the bristlecone is being realized.
sentences.translation: 如今，人们比以往任何时候都更加意识到监测狐尾松的重要性。

structure.text: the importance of monitoring the bristlecone
is being realized

difficult_points: Now more than ever 是插入的比较状语，强调这种重要性认识达到了前所未有的程度。
is being realized 是现在进行时被动语态，强调这一认识正在形成中。

expressions.meaning_zh: 比以往任何时候都更加

sentences.sentence: As our global climate continues to undergo its most recent and abrupt atmospheric change, these ancient scribes continue to respond.
sentences.translation: 随着全球气候继续经历最近这场剧烈的大气变化，这些古老的“记录者”也在不断做出回应。

structure.text: As our global climate continues to undergo its most recent and abrupt atmospheric change
these ancient scribes
continue to respond

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示与主句动作同时进行。
these ancient scribes 是比喻说法，把狐尾松比作记录历史的“古老书记员”。

sentences.sentence: Since, the rings of wood formed each year reveal the trees'response to climatic conditions during a particular growing season, in their persistence they have left us natural recordings of the past, markers of the present, and clues to the future.
sentences.translation: 由于每年形成的木质年轮揭示了树木在某个生长季节对气候条件的反应，它们凭借这份坚韧，为我们留下了记录过去的自然档案、标示现在的标记，以及通向未来的线索。

structure.text: Since, the rings of wood formed each year reveal the trees'response to climatic conditions during a particular growing season
formed each year
in their persistence
they
have left us natural recordings of the past, markers of the present, and clues to the future

difficult_points: Since 后多出的逗号是原文排版问题，应连读为 Since the rings of wood...，表示原因。
formed each year 是过去分词短语，修饰 the rings of wood，说明年轮是每年形成的。
trees'response 中缺失空格是原文排版问题，应为 trees' response。
natural recordings of the past, markers of the present, and clues to the future 三者并列，都是 left us 的宾语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 凭借某物的坚韧/持续存在

sentences.sentence: The species' name originates from the appearance of its unusual cones and needles.
sentences.translation: 这一物种的名字来源于其独特的球果和松针的外观。

structure.text: The species' name
originates from the appearance of its unusual cones and needles

difficult_points: originate from 表示“源自；起源于”。
its unusual cones and needles 说明命名依据的是球果和松针外观上的独特之处。

sentences.sentence: The bristlecone's short, pale needles are also trademarks, bunching together to form foxtail-like bundles.
sentences.translation: 狐尾松短而浅色的松针也是其标志性特征，它们簇拥在一起，形成狐狸尾巴般的针束。

structure.text: The bristlecone's short, pale needles
are also trademarks
bunching together to form foxtail-like bundles

difficult_points: bunching together... 是现在分词短语作伴随状语，补充说明松针的具体形态。
foxtail-like bundles 是比喻说法，把松针簇比作狐狸尾巴。

sentences.sentence: As is the case of most conifer needles, these specialized leaves cluster together to shelter the stomata so very little moisture is lost through them.
sentences.translation: 正如大多数针叶树的松针一样，这些特化的叶片簇拥在一起以遮蔽气孔，因此几乎不会通过气孔损失水分。

structure.text: As is the case of most conifer needles
these specialized leaves
cluster together to shelter the stomata
to shelter the stomata
so very little moisture is lost through them

difficult_points: As is the case of 是固定表达，意为“……的情况也是如此”。
to shelter 是不定式作目的状语，说明叶片簇拥的目的。
so 引导结果状语从句，说明簇拥遮蔽气孔带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: This adaptation helps the bristlecone photosynthesize during particularly brutal months. Saving the energy of constant needle replacement and providing a stable supply of chlorophyll.
sentences.translation: 这种适应有助于狐尾松在尤为严酷的月份进行光合作用，同时节省了不断更换松针所需的能量，并提供了稳定的叶绿素供应。

structure.text: This adaptation
helps the bristlecone photosynthesize during particularly brutal months
Saving the energy of constant needle replacement and providing a stable supply of chlorophyll

difficult_points: help sb do 结构中 photosynthesize 是不带 to 的原形动词，作宾语补足语。
Saving...and providing... 是现在分词短语，前面多出的句号是原文排版错误，应视为对前一句的补充说明（伴随结果），而非独立成句。
the energy of constant needle replacement 指反复更换松针原本需要消耗的能量。

sentences.sentence: For a plant trying to store so much energy, bristlecone seeds are relatively large in size.
sentences.translation: 对于一种努力储存如此多能量的植物来说，狐尾松的种子相对个头较大。

structure.text: For a plant trying to store so much energy
bristlecone seeds
are relatively large in size

difficult_points: For a plant trying to... 是介词短语作状语，trying to store so much energy 是现在分词短语修饰 a plant。
large in size 中 in size 限定 large 的方面，强调是“体积上”较大。

sentences.sentence: They are first reproduced when trees reach ages between thirty and seventy-five years old.
sentences.translation: 狐尾松要到树龄达到三十至七十五岁之间时，才会第一次结出种子。

structure.text: They
are first reproduced
when trees reach ages between thirty and seventy-five years old

difficult_points: are reproduced 是被动语态，They 指代前一句提到的种子（或产生种子这一行为）。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明首次结实所对应的树龄区间。

sentences.sentence: Germination rates are generally high, in part because seeds require little to no initial stratification.
sentences.translation: 发芽率通常较高，部分原因在于这些种子几乎不需要初始的低温层积处理。

structure.text: Germination rates
are generally high
in part because seeds require little to no initial stratification

difficult_points: in part because 表示“部分原因是”，说明这只是发芽率高的原因之一。
little to no 表示“几乎没有；很少甚至没有”。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps the most intriguing physical characteristic of a mature bristlecone, however, is its ratio of living to deadwood on harsh sites and how this relates to old age.
sentences.translation: 然而，成熟狐尾松最引人入胜的生理特征，或许要数它在恶劣环境中活木与枯木的比例，以及这一比例与高龄之间的关系。

structure.text: Perhaps the most intriguing physical characteristic of a mature bristlecone
is its ratio of living to deadwood on harsh sites
and how this relates to old age

difficult_points: however 是插入语，表示转折，引出与前文外观特征不同的另一类特征。
and how this relates to old age 是与前面表语并列的名词性从句，作系动词 is 的另一个表语。

expressions.text: the ratio of A to B

sentences.sentence: In older trees, however, especially in individuals over 1,500 years, a strip-bark trait is adaptive.
sentences.translation: 然而，在树龄较大的个体中，尤其是超过1500年的个体，条形树皮这一特征具有适应性优势。

structure.text: In older trees
especially in individuals over 1,500 years
a strip-bark trait
is adaptive

difficult_points: however 插入语再次表示转折，与前面成年树木的一般情况区分开来。
especially in individuals over 1,500 years 是对 In older trees 的进一步限定，强调超高龄个体尤为明显。

expressions.meaning_zh: 适应性的；有利于适应的

sentences.sentence: This condition occurs as a result of cambium dieback, which erodes and thereby exposes certain areas of the bole, leaving only narrow bands of bark intact.
sentences.translation: 这种状况是形成层枯死的结果，枯死过程会侵蚀并从而暴露出树干的某些部分，只留下狭窄的树皮带保持完整。

structure.text: This condition
occurs as a result of cambium dieback
which erodes and thereby exposes certain areas of the bole
leaving only narrow bands of bark intact

difficult_points: as a result of 表示“作为……的结果”，说明条形树皮特征产生的原因。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 cambium dieback，erodes 和 exposes 是其中并列的谓语。
leaving...是现在分词短语作结果状语，说明侵蚀暴露后留下的最终状态。

sentences.sentence: The technique of cambial edge retreat has helped promote old age in bristlecone pine, but that certainly is no the only reason.
sentences.translation: 形成层边缘退缩这一机制有助于促成狐尾松的高龄，但这肯定不是唯一的原因。

structure.text: The technique of cambial edge retreat
has helped promote old age in bristlecone pine
but that certainly is no the only reason

difficult_points: help do 结构中 promote 是不带 to 的原形动词，作宾语补足语。
is no the only reason 中 no 应为 not，是原文排版/拼写错误，此处按原文保留，意思是“不是唯一的原因”。

sentences.sentence: Most crucial to these trees' longevity is their compact size and slow rates of growth.
sentences.translation: 对这些树木长寿最为关键的，是它们紧凑的体型和缓慢的生长速度。

structure.text: Most crucial to these trees' longevity
is
their compact size and slow rates of growth

difficult_points: 句子把表语 Most crucial to these trees' longevity 提到句首，真正的主语是后面的 their compact size and slow rates of growth。
compact size 与前一段落提到的形成层边缘退缩机制并列，是狐尾松长寿的另一重要因素。

sentences.sentence: By remaining in most cases under ten meters tall, bristlecones stay close to the limited water supply and can hence support more branches and photosynthesizing.
sentences.translation: 由于大多数情况下高度不足十米，狐尾松能够贴近有限的水源，因而能够支撑更多的枝条并进行更多的光合作用。

structure.text: By remaining in most cases under ten meters tall
bristlecones
stay close to the limited water supply
and can hence support more branches and photosynthesizing

difficult_points: By remaining... 是介词短语作方式状语，说明狐尾松保持矮小体型这一方式。
hence 表示“因此”，连接原因（贴近水源）与结果（能支撑更多枝条）。

sentences.sentence: Combined with the dry, windy, and often freezing mountain air, slow growth guarantees the bristlecones tight, fibrous rings with a high resin content and structural strength.
sentences.translation: 再加上干燥、多风且常常严寒的山地空气，缓慢的生长确保了狐尾松拥有紧密、纤维状的年轮，树脂含量高，结构强度也高。

structure.text: Combined with the dry, windy, and often freezing mountain air
slow growth
guarantees the bristlecones tight, fibrous rings
with a high resin content and structural strength

difficult_points: Combined with... 是过去分词短语作状语，说明缓慢生长与山地气候共同作用的背景。
guarantees the bristlecones tight, fibrous rings 是双宾语结构，guarantees 后接间接宾语和直接宾语。

sentences.sentence: The absence of natural disaster has also safeguarded the bristlecone's lengthy lifespan.
sentences.translation: 自然灾害的缺席也保护了狐尾松漫长的寿命。

structure.text: The absence of natural disaster
has also safeguarded the bristlecone's lengthy lifespan

difficult_points: The absence of 表示“……的缺失/没有”，是名词化的表达方式。
also 表明这是继树木体型和生长速度之后，又一个促成狐尾松长寿的因素。

sentences.sentence: Due to a lack of ground cover vegetation and an evenly spaced layout, bristlecone stands on the White Mountain peaks have been practically unaffected by the fire.
sentences.translation: 由于地表植被覆盖少、树木分布也较为均匀，白山山峰上的狐尾松林几乎不受火灾的影响。

structure.text: Due to a lack of ground cover vegetation and an evenly spaced layout
bristlecone stands on the White Mountain peaks
have been practically unaffected by the fire

difficult_points: Due to 引导原因状语，说明狐尾松林几乎不受火灾影响的两个原因。
an evenly spaced layout 指树木之间分布均匀、间隔较大，不易形成连片燃烧。

sentences.sentence: This lack of vegetation also means a lack of competition for the bristlecones.
sentences.translation: 植被的缺乏同时也意味着狐尾松几乎不用面对竞争。

structure.text: This lack of vegetation
also means a lack of competition for the bristlecones

difficult_points: This lack of vegetation 指代前一句提到的地表植被稀少这一状况。
a lack of competition 与 a lack of vegetation 结构呼应，说明二者之间的因果关系。

sentences.sentence: Bristlecone pines restricted to numerous, rather isolated stands at higher altitudes in the southwestern United States.
sentences.translation: 狐尾松局限分布于美国西南部海拔较高地区众多、相对孤立的林分之中。

structure.text: Bristlecone pines
restricted to numerous, rather isolated stands at higher altitudes in the southwestern United States

difficult_points: restricted 前疑似省略了 are，属于原文的语法疏漏，此处按原文保留，理解为 are restricted to。
rather isolated 修饰 stands，说明这些林分彼此之间相对孤立分散。

sentences.sentence: Stands occur from the Rocky Mountains, through the Colorado Plateau, to the western margin of the Great Basin.
sentences.translation: 这些林分从落基山脉起，经科罗拉多高原，一直延伸到大盆地的西缘。

structure.text: Stands
occur
from the Rocky Mountains, through the Colorado Plateau, to the western margin of the Great Basin

difficult_points: from...through...to... 三个介词短语并列，描绘出狐尾松分布的地理路线。
Stands 在此指代狐尾松的“林分”，即某一地区内狐尾松聚集生长的群落。

sentences.sentence: Within this natural range, the oldest and most widely researched stands of bristlecones occur in California's the White Mountains.
sentences.translation: 在这一自然分布范围内，最古老、研究最广泛的狐尾松林分布在加州的白山。

structure.text: Within this natural range
the oldest and most widely researched stands of bristlecones
occur in California's the White Mountains

difficult_points: California's the White Mountains 中 's 后又加 the，是原文排版重复问题，实际所指即“加州的白山”。
the oldest and most widely researched 并列修饰 stands，强调其历史最悠久、研究最充分两重特点。

sentences.sentence: Even just 200 miles away from the Pacific Ocean, the White Mountains are home to one of this country's few high-elevation deserts.
sentences.translation: 尽管距离太平洋只有大约200英里，白山却是这个国家为数不多的高海拔沙漠之一的所在地。

structure.text: Even just 200 miles away from the Pacific Ocean
the White Mountains
are home to one of this country's few high-elevation deserts

difficult_points: Even just 200 miles away from... 是让步意味的状语，强调尽管离海不远，此地却是沙漠气候。
be home to 表示“是……的所在地”。

sentences.sentence: Located in the extreme eastern rain shadow of the Sierra Nevada, this region receives only 12.54 inches of precipitation per year and experiences temperatures between -20F and +50F.
sentences.translation: 由于地处内华达山脉最东端的雨影区，这一地区年降水量仅有12.54英寸，气温在零下20华氏度到零上50华氏度之间波动。

structure.text: Located in the extreme eastern rain shadow of the Sierra Nevada
this region
receives only 12.54 inches of precipitation per year
and experiences temperatures between -20F and +50F

difficult_points: Located in... 是过去分词短语作状语，说明这一地区所处的地理位置。
rain shadow 是气象学术语，指山脉背风坡因水汽被阻挡而形成的干燥地带。

sentences.sentence: The peaks south of the Owens Valley, are higher up than they might appear from a distance.
sentences.translation: 欧文斯谷以南的山峰，实际高度比远观时看起来要高。

structure.text: The peaks south of the Owens Valley
are higher up than they might appear from a distance
than they might appear from a distance

difficult_points: the Owens Valley 之后多出的逗号是原文排版问题，不影响 The peaks south of the Owens Valley 作为完整主语。
than 引导比较状语从句，appear from a distance 指从远处看时呈现出的样子。

sentences.sentence: Although most summits exist somewhere around 11,000 feet, snow-capped White Mountain Peak, for which the range is named, stands at 14,246 feet above sea level.
sentences.translation: 尽管大多数山顶海拔约为11000英尺，但白山山脉正是因它而得名的、终年积雪的白山峰，海拔却高达14246英尺。

structure.text: Although most summits exist somewhere around 11,000 feet
snow-capped White Mountain Peak
for which the range is named
stands at 14,246 feet above sea level

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，与后文白山峰的实际高度形成对比。
for which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 White Mountain Peak，说明白山山脉的名字正是来源于这座山峰。

sentences.sentence: That said, to reach areas of a pure bristlecone is an intense journey all to itself.
sentences.translation: 话虽如此，要到达纯狐尾松分布的区域，本身就是一段极为艰辛的旅程。

structure.text: That said
to reach areas of a pure bristlecone
is an intense journey all to itself

difficult_points: That said 是插入语，表示“话虽如此”，起转折过渡作用。
不定式 to reach areas of a pure bristlecone 作句子的主语。
all to itself 强调这段旅程本身就足以构成一次独立而艰辛的体验。

sentences.sentence: With seemingly endless areas of wonder and interest, the bristlecone pines have become subject to much research over the past half-century.
sentences.translation: 由于拥有看似无穷无尽的令人惊叹和感兴趣的方面，狐尾松在过去半个世纪里已成为大量研究的对象。

structure.text: With seemingly endless areas of wonder and interest
the bristlecone pines
have become subject to much research over the past half-century

difficult_points: With... 是介词短语作原因状语，说明狐尾松受到大量研究关注的背景。
be subject to 表示“成为……的对象；受制于”。

sentences.sentence: Since the annual growth of these ancient organisms directly reflects the climatic conditions of a particular time period, bristlecones are of greatest significance to dendrochronologists or tree-ring specialists.
sentences.translation: 由于这些古老生物每年的生长情况直接反映了某一特定时期的气候条件，狐尾松对树木年轮学家而言意义重大。

structure.text: Since the annual growth of these ancient organisms directly reflects the climatic conditions of a particular time period
bristlecones
are of greatest significance to dendrochronologists or tree-ring specialists

difficult_points: Since 引导原因状语从句，说明狐尾松受到年轮学家重视的原因。
be of great significance to 是“be+of+抽象名词”结构，相当于 be very significant to。

sentences.sentence: Dating any tree is simple and can be done within reasonable accuracy just by counting out the rings made each year by the plant's natural means of growth.
sentences.translation: 给任何一棵树测定年代都很简单，只需数清楚这种植物每年自然生长所形成的年轮数目，就能得到相当准确的结果。

structure.text: Dating any tree
is simple and can be done within reasonable accuracy
just by counting out the rings made each year by the plant's natural means of growth
made each year by the plant's natural means of growth

difficult_points: Dating any tree 是动名词短语作主语。
by doing 表示方式，说明测定年代所采用的具体方法。
made each year... 是过去分词短语，修饰 the rings，说明年轮是每年自然生长形成的。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在合理的准确度范围内

sentences.sentence: By carefully compiling a nearly 10,000-year-old bristlecone pine record, these patient scientists have accurately corrected the carbon-14 dating method and estimated ages of past periods of global climate change.
sentences.translation: 通过细致地编制这份跨越近一万年的狐尾松记录，这些耐心的科学家们准确校正了碳14测年法，并估算出了过去全球气候变化各个时期的年代。

structure.text: By carefully compiling a nearly 10,000-year-old bristlecone pine record
these patient scientists
have accurately corrected the carbon-14 dating method
and estimated ages of past periods of global climate change

difficult_points: By doing 表示方式，说明科学家取得成果所采用的方法。
corrected 和 estimated 是并列谓语，共用主语 these patient scientists。

sentences.sentence: What makes this record so special to dendrochronologists, too, is that, nowhere, throughout time, is precisely the same long-term sequence of wide and narrow rings repeated, because year-to-year variations in climate are never exactly the same.
sentences.translation: 让这份记录对树木年轮学家而言同样特别的地方在于，纵观整个历史时期，从未在任何地方重复出现过完全相同的宽窄年轮长期序列，因为逐年的气候变化从来都不会完全一样。

structure.text: What makes this record so special to dendrochronologists, too
is
that, nowhere, throughout time, is precisely the same long-term sequence of wide and narrow rings repeated
is precisely the same long-term sequence of wide and narrow rings repeated
because year-to-year variations in climate are never exactly the same

difficult_points: What 引导主语从句，What makes...special 整体作句子主语。
that 从句内部因否定意味的 nowhere 提前，引发主谓倒装，正常语序为 the same...sequence...is repeated nowhere。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释为什么完全相同的年轮序列从未重复出现。

sentences.sentence: Historically the bristlecone's remote location and gnarled wood have deterred commercial extraction, but nothing on earth will go unaffected by global warming.
sentences.translation: 从历史上看，狐尾松地处偏远、木质盘曲多节，一直阻止了商业采伐，但地球上没有什么能够不受全球变暖的影响。

structure.text: the bristlecone's remote location and gnarled wood
have deterred commercial extraction
but nothing on earth will go unaffected by global warming

difficult_points: Historically 是句首状语，说明这一情况长期以来的历史事实。
go unaffected by 表示“不受……影响”，go 在此作系动词，相当于 remain。

sentences.sentence: If temperatures rise by only 6 degrees F, which many experts say is likely this century, about two-thirds of the bristlecones' ideal habitat in the White Mountains effectively will be gone.
sentences.translation: 如果气温仅上升6华氏度——许多专家认为本世纪就有可能发生——白山地区约三分之二的狐尾松理想栖息地实际上将不复存在。

structure.text: If temperatures rise by only 6 degrees F
which many experts say is likely this century
about two-thirds of the bristlecones' ideal habitat in the White Mountains
effectively will be gone

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明气温上升这一假设情形。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰前面整个“气温上升6华氏度”这件事，many experts say 是插入语。

sentences.sentence: Almost 30,000 acres of National Forest now preserves the ancient bristlecone, but paved roads, campsites, and self-guided trails have led only to more human impact.
sentences.translation: 如今，将近三万英亩的国家森林保护着这些古老的狐尾松，但铺装道路、露营地和自助步道却只带来了更多的人类影响。

structure.text: Almost 30,000 acres of National Forest
now preserves the ancient bristlecone
but paved roads, campsites, and self-guided trails have led only to more human impact

difficult_points: Almost 30,000 acres of National Forest 是数量短语作主语，谓语用单数 preserves，视为一个整体。
lead to 表示“导致”，only 强调这些设施带来的结果仅仅是更多的人为影响，而非保护效果的增强。

sentences.sentence: In 1966, the U.S.F.S reported over 20,000 visitors to the Ancient Bristlecone Pine Forest, a figure which could exceed 40,000 today.
sentences.translation: 1966年，美国林务局报告称古老狐尾松森林接待了超过两万名游客，而这一数字如今可能已超过四万。

structure.text: the U.S.F.S
reported over 20,000 visitors to the Ancient Bristlecone Pine Forest
a figure which could exceed 40,000 today
which could exceed 40,000 today

difficult_points: the U.S.F.S 是 United States Forest Service（美国林务局）的缩写。
a figure which... 是对前面 20,000 visitors 这一数字的同位语说明，which 引导定语从句修饰 a figure。

sentences.sentence: Over the past hundreds of thousands of years, this species has endured in one of the earth's most trying environments; they deserve our respect and reverence.
sentences.translation: 在过去数十万年间，这一物种一直在地球上最严酷的环境之一中顽强生存；它们值得我们的敬重与敬畏。

structure.text: Over the past hundreds of thousands of years
this species
has endured in one of the earth's most trying environments
they deserve our respect and reverence

difficult_points: 分号连接两个独立分句，前者陈述事实，后者是由此得出的评价性结论。
one of the earth's most trying environments 中 trying 是形容词，意为“艰难的、严酷的”，而非动词。

sentences.sentence: As global climate change slowly alters their environment, we as humans must do our part to raise awareness and lower our impact.
sentences.translation: 随着全球气候变化逐渐改变它们的生存环境，身为人类的我们必须尽自己的一份力，提高公众意识并减少我们造成的影响。

structure.text: As global climate change slowly alters their environment
we as humans
must do our part
to raise awareness and lower our impact

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示与主句动作同时发生的渐进过程。
do one's part 表示“尽自己的一份力”。
to raise awareness and lower our impact 是并列的不定式短语，作目的状语。
